# HARDWARIO Documentation

> Technical documentation for HARDWARIO products and services — hardware,
> firmware, APIs, integrations and guides for the company's industrial /
> wireless IoT (LPWAN: NB-IoT, LTE-M, LoRaWAN) platform. Published by
> HARDWARIO a.s., a Czech IoT manufacturer based in Liberec. English. Welcomes
> AI crawlers; the full page list is in the sitemap below.

## Documentation

- [Documentation home](https://docs.hardwario.com/): entry point to all product and service documentation
- [Sitemap](https://docs.hardwario.com/sitemap.xml): complete, machine-readable list of every documentation page
- [Search](https://docs.hardwario.com/search): full-text search across the docs

## More from HARDWARIO

- [HARDWARIO a.s.](https://www.hardwario.com): company site — products, solutions and services
- [HARDWARIO STEM](https://stem.hardwario.com): STEM learning platform for schools
- [HARDWARIO Academy](https://hardwario.academy): teaching IoT in practice with the TOWER kit
- [HARDWARIO Store](https://www.hardwario.store): shop for HARDWARIO products

## Contact

- [Email ask@hardwario.com](mailto:ask@hardwario.com): product and integration enquiries (phone +420 775 159 734)
